# Mobile Humanitarian Agency (MHA)

> South Sudanese NGO (NGOs Act 2016) delivering protection, GBV response, child protection, and youth programming for displaced communities since 2017.

## About

- **Name:** Mobile Humanitarian Agency (MHA)
- **Tagline:** Safeguarding Rights. Restoring Dignity.
- **Founded:** 2017 in Juba, South Sudan
- **Website:** https://www.mha-ss.org
- **Email:** mobilehumanitarianagency@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +211 911828150
- **Head office:** Hai Magateen, Juba, South Sudan

## What we do

- General protection and community-based protection monitoring
- Gender-based violence (GBV) prevention and response
- Child protection and child-friendly spaces
- Community engagement and accountability
- Housing, land, and property (HLP) and access to justice
- Youth empowerment and livelihoods
- WASH, shelter/NFI, and emergency response where funded

## Where we work

Active counties in **Unity State** (Leer, Mayiandit, Panyijiar) and **Jonglei State** (Akobo, Uror, Duk, Pigi/Canal), with headquarters in Juba.

## Partners & accountability

MHA coordinates with UN agencies, INGOs, and local partners. Governance documents and activity logs are published for donor and partner due diligence.
